series_metadata.series_title: Analytical Toxicology Lab Archived Standard Operating Procedures and Method Validation Records
series_metadata.series_description: Analytical Toxicology Lab (ATL) archived Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) are procedures that will no longer be used in the Analytical Toxicology Lab (ATL). Method Validation records are records that the lab created when validating the procedure. The Quality Assurance Coordinator is the Record Retention Coordinator.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 10 years after the SOP has been archived. ; Electronic: Destroy 10 years after the SOP has been archived., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
